colocation.definition: For each lead and variable, top 1 percent by absolute mass-grid error is compared by Jaccard and overlap.

compatibility.mass_grid_note: Region, correlation, and selected-cell diagnostics destagger U/V horizontally and W/PH vertically onto the mass grid. Native-shape field stats preserve original WRF staggering.

environment.note: This script imports numpy and netCDF4 only; no JAX/GPU execution is performed.

limits: This is a wrfout-only attribution and makes no pass/fail equivalence claim.
Hourly wrfouts cannot determine whether wind drives mass/geopotential error or the reverse.
Static/base-state writer mismatches are excluded from dynamic ranking but remain a separate validation gate.

candidate_filters.fallback: outside 8-cell frame, then any finite mass-grid cell
candidate_filters.preferred: outside 8-cell frame and LANDMASK == 0 or HGT < 300 m

localization_manifest.candidate_source: highest primary localization score in h10-h14; fallback h8-h14/all leads if unavailable

next_target.rationale: Surface winds are nearly co-located with low-level prognostic U/V error, while PSFC/MU/P/PH are already materially bad. Existing proof inventory says JAX-only diagnostics are not WRF same-state truth.
next_target.recommendation: Build CPU-WRF term savepoints for the selected lead/cells before relying on a JAX-only operator probe.

prior_evidence.same_state_inventory_truth_requirement: CPU WRF source-derived term savepoints, not JAX self-comparison
prior_evidence.wind_mass_probe_top_hypothesis: Prognostic wind-column divergence with a near-surface projection, coupled to mass/geopotential error and peaking around h10-h14.

report_only_thresholds.materially_bad_lead_definition: first lead where any compared target field RMSE meets or exceeds its predeclared report-only threshold

static_writer_exclusions.note: Known static/time-invariant writer and base-state fields are not ranked as dynamic forecast errors.

static_parity_conclusion.base_state_mismatch: PHB dominated by CPU output convention; PB/MUB also include retained h1 forecast_or_writer_reconstruction residual
static_parity_conclusion.mapfac_mismatch: pre_fix_writer_payload_grid_metrics; fixed in current synthetic writer payload
static_parity_conclusion.vertical_metric_mismatch: pre_fix_writer_payload_grid_metrics; fixed in current synthetic writer payload
